name: Shopmania
body: [{"type":"h4","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania1.05T5g00000w5phxEAA.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania1.05T5g00000w5phxEAA.jpg","name":"Image1","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":200,"width":493}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"\nThis add-on was built by Maropost"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "},{"type":"a","url":"https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"let us know"}]},{"text":"!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ShopMania is a shopping comparison website which allows customers find and compare millions of products, all in one spot."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Maropost Commerce data feeds send information to ShopMania to update your products through the shopping comparison website."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Tip","bold":true},{"text":": Maropost Commerce partners can set this up for you. "},{"type":"a","url":"https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Visit the job request portal"}]},{"text":" for a quote."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania2.05T5g00000w5pmiEAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania2.05T5g00000w5pmiEAA.png","name":"image2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":248,"width":700}}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Set up the Shopmania Add-on"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To install and set up the Shopmania add-on:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Sign up for a "},{"type":"a","url":"https://partner.shopmania.com.au/?go=home","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Shopmania"}]},{"text":" account."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In your Maropost Commerce control panel navigate to "},{"text":"Other","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Shopping feeds","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Find ShopMania and click the "},{"text":"Install","bold":true},{"text":" button."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania3.05T5g00000w5oNKEAY.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania3.05T5g00000w5oNKEAY.png","name":"image3","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":248,"width":700}}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You’ll be provided with a Feed URL. Provide this URL to ShopMania. This is a link to a file that contains a list of your products in the required format."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania4.05T5g00000w5pnqEAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania4.05T5g00000w5pnqEAA.png","name":"image4","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":247,"width":700}}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can modify the Feed URL, filtering products that you don’t wish to push to ShopMania. To do this, click the "},{"text":"Edit","bold":true},{"text":" button."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania5.05T5g00000w5pooEAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania5.05T5g00000w5pooEAA.png","name":"image5","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":248,"width":700}}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Scroll down to the "},{"text":"File Builder","bold":true},{"text":" section and click the "},{"text":"Filter","bold":true},{"text":" tab to make products, categories, pricing and other changes. Scroll down and click "},{"text":"Save Changes","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania6.05T5g00000w5pprEAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania6.05T5g00000w5pprEAA.png","name":"image6","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":248,"width":700}}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To make changes to the feed scroll back up the top and click the "},{"text":"Generate Data File","bold":true},{"text":" button and click "},{"text":"Download Data File","bold":true},{"text":" button to review the results of your changes."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania7.05T5g00000w5pqBEAQ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Shopmania7.05T5g00000w5pqBEAQ.png","name":"image7","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":248,"width":700}}]}]}]}]
